creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Created attachment 252502
port update to version 1.2.2

Attached is the patch to update port to new version 1.2.2 [I am the maintainer]

Build tested with "poudriere bulk -t" on 13.3 amd64 + PHP 8.2, PHP 8.4, portlint: "looks fine"

https://pecl.php.net/package-changelog.php?package=excimer&release=1.2.2
 - Fix PHP 8.4 compatibility (patch by Remi Collet) 

Note: directory "files" with the old patch must be removed from the port
